data.summary: [5/15 (Thu) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were found to be
data.body:
[5/15 (Thu) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were found to be abusing in-game mechanics to gain an unfair advantage over others.

▶Total number of players banned: 23,268
▶Period of Restriction: Permanent

We will never tolerate illegal programs under any circumstances as they may potentially harm the game's environment and other players.

▶Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2895295

#BlueArchive
![1.jfif](https://kivo.wiki/files/15949/duJhWaStc0trWlLCxKEQiWHvcsFiOwFZ.jpg)
